7 - Employee Brain Syndrome.mp4 Stanford researchers call it employee brain syndrome. This is why you feel stuck even when you're trying side hustles. Here's what they found. After just two years in a traditional job, your interior cingulate cortex— the part of your brain responsible for recognizing opportunities— actually shrinks by 23%. Your brain is literally getting worse at spotting chances to improve your life. It's like your job is installing blinders on you day by day. This is why even when you try side hustles, they never work out. It's not that you're lazy or lack motivation. Your brain has been physically conditioned to ignore wealth opportunities. Here's the breakthrough. I was able to figure out how to reverse this damage using the Freedom Affiliate formula, like physical therapy for your opportunity recognition. Instead of fighting your employee conditioned brain, this system—the system— uses simple commission notifications to rebuild those neural pathways. Every $100, $200, or $300 commission literally retrains your brain to recognize opportunities again. Got my first $1,000 a day because all the puzzle pieces fit. And that was amazing. All of a sudden I went from like one sale to a couple and I was there. Within 90 days, that shrunken opportunity center begins firing again. You begin seeing possibilities everywhere. The freedom affiliate formula includes proven products that pay you 100 or more per sale. Done for you. templates and complete training designed to work just four to five hours per week while your brain repairs itself. So click below to see how you can heal the damage before it gets worse. Every day you wait at the opportunity center keeps on shrinking.
